ddls:
CREATE TABLE "area_codes" (
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the area belongs */,
  "latitude" REAL /* GPS latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* GPS longitude of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the area data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_types" (
  "area_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the area type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent area type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the area type data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES area_types ("area_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data entry */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code */,
  "area_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "new_cases_publish" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported by publish date */,
  "new_cases_specimen" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported by specimen date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases up to the recorded date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases up to the recorded date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths up to the recorded date */,
  "hospitalized_cases" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases up to the recorded date */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the case data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_area_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_type_id") REFERENCES area_types ("area_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the health authority */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code the authority is responsible for */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the health authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the health authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the health authority's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the health authority data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_authorities_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, administrator) */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health authority the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_data ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code for which the report is generated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period covered by the report */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period covered by the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, outbreak report) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code where the intervention occurred */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the intervention (e.g., on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the intervention data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code the communication is addressed to */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date when the communication was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, SMS, press release) */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate to the communication */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code that receives the resources */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource allocated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resources were allocated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the resources (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation (e.g., allocated, delivered) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code the model is for */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the predictive model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the predictive model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_planning" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Reference to the area code the scenario is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "potential_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the scenario */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the scenario occurring */,
  "mitigation_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to mitigate the impact of the scenario */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the scenario data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES area_codes ("area_code")
)
